name: Mamba
training_approach: pretraining on language data with selective state space layers
lineage_path: Classical state space models -> HiPPO -> S4 -> Mamba
summary: Mamba introduced selective state spaces with input-dependent parameters, allowing the model to selectively remember or forget information based on the input, addressing S4's limitation of content-independent dynamics. Developed by Gu and Dao, it achieved transformer-competitive performance on language modeling with linear-time inference scaling, making it the first serious non-attention architecture to challenge transformers on their home turf. Its hardware-aware parallel scan algorithm enabled efficient GPU implementation, sparking a wave of hybrid transformer-SSM architectures.
